flashcards.definition: Orbits the Sun, spherical, but hasn't cleared its orbital neighborhood (e.g., Pluto, Ceres).
Region between Mars and Jupiter containing most asteroids; total mass < Earth's Moon.
Asteroid with orbit that brings it close to Earth's orbit; monitoring for impact risk.
Carbonaceous asteroid; most common type; dark, primitive composition.
NASA's Double Asteroid Redirection Test (2022); demonstrated kinetic impactor deflection of asteroid Dimorphos.
